sentences.english: Diet, exercise, and eating in moderation helps some people stay at a healthy weight.
sentences.korean: 식단, 운동, 적당히 먹기가 일부 사람들의 건강한 체중 유지에 도움이 되지만, 영국 성인의 약 65%가 과체중으로 추정되니 모두에게 통하지는 않아요.

sentences.english: But with around 65% of British adults estimated to be overweight, that doesn't help everyone.
sentences.korean: / 하지만 영국 성인의 약 65%가 과체중으로 추정되는데, 모두에게 도움이 되지는 않는다.

sentences.english: Weight loss drugs like Ozempic and Mounjaro have been a hot topic this year.
sentences.korean: 오젬픽과 마운자로 같은 체중 감량 약물이 올해 뜨거운 주제였어요.

sentences.english: The drugs are modified versions of natural hormones which make us feel full when released into the body.
sentences.korean: 이 약물들은 몸에 분비되면 포만감을 느끼게 하는 천연 호르몬의 변형 버전이에요.

sentences.english: Well, I don't get hungry, so food noise stops.
sentences.korean: 배고프지 않아서 음식에 대한 잡념이 멈춰요.

quiz.question: What does '(관용구) 양심과 유혹 사이의 개인적 딜레마' mean in English?
options: an angel on one shoulder and a devil on the other

sentences.english: And all those scripts about yourself — that you're a bad person for eating.
sentences.korean: 먹는다고 나쁜 사람이라는 자기 판단 — 그런 게 다 허공 속으로 사라진 것 같아요.

sentences.english: I feel like that judgment has drifted into the ether.
sentences.korean: / 그 판단이 사라진 것 같아요 허공 속으로.

sentences.english: For me, it was a conflict, like I'd got a devil and an angel on my shoulder.
The angel saying you shouldn't eat that, and the devil saying, well you know you want to.
sentences.korean: 마치 어깨 위에 악마와 천사가 있는 것 같았죠. 천사는 그거 먹지 말라고 하고, 악마는 먹고 싶은 거 알잖아 하고요.

sentences.english: Over many years, this inner conflict damaged Lynne's self-esteem, her belief and confidence in her own abilities.
sentences.korean: 수년간 이 내면의 갈등이 린의 자존감 — 자기 능력에 대한 믿음과 자신감을 손상시켰어요.

quiz.question: What does '시장에 나온 — 판매 가능한' mean in English?

sentences.english: Weight loss drugs weren't invented to lose weight at all.
sentences.korean: 체중 감량 약물은 원래 체중을 줄이려고 발명된 게 아니에요.

sentences.english: They were originally designed for diabetes.
sentences.korean: 당뇨병을 위해 설계된 건데 나중에야 의사들이 체중에 대한 효과를 알아챘어요.

sentences.english: It was only later that doctors noticed the drugs' effect on weight.
sentences.korean: / 나중에야 의사들이 알아챘다 약물의 효과를 체중에 대한.

sentences.english: We talk about Ozempic first because that was the first on the market for diabetes, and then people begin to notice, as a side effect, that people were losing weight.
sentences.korean: 오젬픽을 먼저 이야기하는데 당뇨병을 위해 처음 시장에 나왔거든요. 그러다 부작용으로 사람들이 체중이 줄고 있다는 걸 알아채기 시작했어요.

sentences.english: Ozempic was the first drug on the market.

quiz.question: What does '시장에 나온 — 판매 가능한' mean in English?
options: an angel on one shoulder and a devil on the other

sentences.english: When something is on the market, it's available for sale.
sentences.korean: on the market이란 판매 가능하다는 뜻이에요.

sentences.english: Ozempic was designed for diabetes, but doctors noticed that patients lost weight as a side effect — an unexpected secondary effect of a drug.
sentences.korean: 오젬픽은 당뇨병용으로 설계됐지만, 의사들이 환자들의 체중이 줄었다는 걸 부작용으로 알아챘어요 — 약물의 예상치 못한 이차적 효과죠.

sentences.english: I asked what BMI stands for.
sentences.korean: BMI가 무엇의 약자인지 물었는데 정답은 b) body mass index(체질량지수)예요.

sentences.english: The answer is b) body mass index.

quiz.question: What does '시장에 나온 — 판매 가능한' mean in English?
options: an angel on one shoulder and a devil on the other
